items.title: Pittsburgh-based Gray Swan, which stress-tests AI models for top frontier AI labs, raised a $40M Series A at a $200M valuation co-led by Wing VC and Madrona (Rashi Shrivastava/Forbes)
items.title_original: Pittsburgh-based Gray Swan, which stress-tests AI models for top frontier AI labs, raised a $40M Series A at a $200M valuation co-led by Wing VC and Madrona (Rashi Shrivastava/Forbes)
items.title_en: Pittsburgh-based Gray Swan, which stress-tests AI models for top frontier AI labs, raised a $40M Series A at a $200M valuation co-led by Wing VC and Madrona (Rashi Shrivastava/Forbes)
items.title_zh: 总部位于匹兹堡的 Gray Swan 为顶级前沿 AI 实验室进行 AI 模型压力测试，以 2 亿美元的估值筹集了 4000 万美元的 A 轮融资，由 Wing VC 和 Madrona（Rashi Shrivastava/福布斯）共同牵头。
